email_body:
Beste Stijn Schyvens,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor IT Support / Service Medewerker bij Flying Service Leuven. Uw oproep voor een duizendpoot met passie voor IT en service sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met het ondersteunen van collega’s bij technische vragen, het beheren van WordPress-sites en het implementeren van nieuwe tools. Ik werk graag met uiteenlopende systemen en leer snel nieuwe platformen zoals Airtable, Notion en Zapier zelfstandig aan. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en mijn gestructureerde aanpak stellen mij in staat om problemen efficiënt te diagnosticeren en op te lossen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de afwisseling en de ruimte om initiatief te nemen. Ik ben sociaal, behulpzaam en werk graag samen met collega’s om praktische oplossingen te vinden. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Stijn Schyvens,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the IT Support / Service Medewerker position at Flying Service Leuven. Your call for a jack-of-all-trades with a passion for IT and service fits my profile perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I support colleagues with technical questions, manage WordPress sites, and implement new tools. I enjoy working with diverse systems and quickly learn new platforms like Airtable, Notion, and Zapier independently. My technical background in web development and structured approach enable me to diagnose and solve problems efficiently.

What attracts me to this role is the variety and the opportunity to take initiative. I am social, helpful, and enjoy collaborating with colleagues to find practical solutions. My Dutch is B1, but I am taking classes to improve further.

I have attached my CV and cover letter. I hope to convince you in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Stijn Schyvens,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van IT Support / Service Medewerker bij Flying Service Leuven. Toen ik de vacature las, voelde ik meteen een klik: de combinatie van IT-ondersteuning, afwisselende projecten en meedenken met collega’s sluit perfect aan bij wat ik zoek in een volgende stap in mijn carrière.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik het eerste aanspreekpunt voor technische vragen van collega’s en klanten. Ik los problemen op met WordPress, e-mailconfiguraties en andere digitale tools, en ik ondersteun bij de implementatie van nieuwe systemen. Daarnaast werk ik zelfstandig aan projecten zoals het bouwen en optimaliseren van websites, waarbij ik gestructureerd te werk ga en oog heb voor detail. Mijn ervaring met tools zoals SEMrush, Google Analytics en diverse CMS-platformen maakt dat ik snel wegwijs word in nieuwe software.

Wat mij aanspreekt in uw organisatie is de informele sfeer en de nadruk op initiatief en groei. Ik ben leergierig en sta open om mij verder te ontwikkelen in IT-support. Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog niet perfect is (B1), ben ik gemotiveerd om dit te verbeteren en communiceer ik vlot in het Engels. Ik ben sociaal, behulpzaam en werk graag samen om praktische oplossingen te vinden.

Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat mijn technische basis, leergierigheid en servicegerichte houding een waardevolle bijdrage kunnen leveren aan uw team. Ik hoop u in een gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Stijn Schyvens,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the IT Support / Service Medewerker position at Flying Service Leuven. When I read the vacancy, I felt an immediate connection: the combination of IT support, varied projects, and collaborating with colleagues fits perfectly with what I am looking for in my next career step.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am the first point of contact for technical questions from colleagues and clients. I solve issues with WordPress, email configurations, and other digital tools, and I support the implementation of new systems. Additionally, I work independently on projects such as building and optimizing websites, where I work in a structured manner with attention to detail. My experience with tools like SEMrush, Google Analytics, and various CMS platforms allows me to quickly learn new software.

What appeals to me about your organization is the informal atmosphere and the emphasis on initiative and growth. I am eager to learn and open to further developing my IT support skills. Although my Dutch is not yet perfect (B1), I am motivated to improve and communicate fluently in English. I am social, helpful, and enjoy collaborating to find practical solutions.

I am confident that my technical foundation, eagerness to learn, and service-oriented attitude can make a valuable contribution to your team. I hope to convince you in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• First-line IT support experience: handling technical questions from colleagues and clients, troubleshooting WordPress, email, and digital tools
• Hands-on with diverse tools: WordPress, Elementor, SEMrush, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and quick to learn new platforms like Airtable, Notion, Zapier
• Project management and initiative: independently built and optimized multi-page websites, implemented structured data, and ran technical audits
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills: diagnose issues, track performance, and propose practical improvements
• Service-minded and collaborative: enjoy helping colleagues, working in teams, and contributing to a positive work environment
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- IT Support & Troubleshooting: first-line technical support, diagnosing and resolving software/hardware issues, user support (remote and on-site)
- Tools & Platforms: WordPress, Elementor, Airtable, Notion, Zapier, Google Workspace, Microsoft Office 365, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Ads
- Web & CMS: WordPress site building and maintenance, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & Social: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- First point of contact for internal IT questions: support colleagues with technical issues (WordPress, email, tools)
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions
- Support implementation of new tools and processes for clients

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
